Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT
REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Establishes the jobs and housing pilot program to create jobs in the construction industry and address the housing crisis
Summary: Establishes the "jobs and housing act"; directs the private housing finance agency to develop and administer a jobs and housing pilot program to construct and preserve housing, including workforce housing, that is affordable to low and moderate income persons, and creates jobs for those who build and work in such housing.
LawCode: Add Art 31-A §§1283 - 1286, Priv Hous Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the private housing finance law, in relation to establishing a jobs and housing pilot program to create jobs in the construction industry and address the housing crisis
